description: Testing initial display of checkboxes in both add and edit forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default slected value
+ List of values
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default slected value: DB's value
+ List of values
...

description: Testing single and multiple checkbox selection functionality

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when select a value:
+ Select the first value 
+ Select any value
+ Select the last value
expected_result:
+ The selected value is Check ON. Other values are unselected 
+ Process with selected value successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when select multi values
expected_result:
+ The selected values are Check ON. Other values are unselected 
+ Process with selected values successfully.

description: Testing interactions and database synchronization for active checkboxes

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of Check box value
expected_result: Mouse becomes hand icon and can select [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of Check box value
expected_result: Mouse becomes hand icon and can select [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when selecting value is edited from DB
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when selecting value is deleted from DB
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click on a selected Check box
expected_result: That Check box is unselected. Other values kept old status

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each disabled radio button
expected_result: Mouse not becomes hand icon [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each disabled radio button
expected_result: Mouse not becomes hand icon [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when select an disabled Check box button
expected_result: Can not select that Check box

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check tab order on keyboard
expected_result: Go to Left to Right, from Up to Down as normal and don't go to disable value

item_type: Edit radio button value by Inspect
description: Testing client-side manipulation prevention of checkbox values

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when changed value of Check box on client web (inspect element)
Ex: Not select any value/ Select all options/ Change value of options/ Change text of options)
expected_result: Can not update wrong value to DB

description: Testing backend configuration changes and their effects on frontend checkbox behavior

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation of frontend after change config on backend
expected_result:
+ Change default value list and selected value correctly corresponding to backend setting
+ Operation of Checkbox is correct after change config.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation if change config on backend while selecting value on frontend page
expected_result:
+ Can change config on backend successfully. 
+ Display notification to frontend [base on each spec]
+ Operation of Checkbox is correct after reload page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation if change config on backend while selecting value on frontend page
expected_result:
+ Can change config on backend successfully. 
+ Display corect error message when submit on frontend

item_type: Check all option of Check box
description: Testing 'Check all' functionality and its interaction with related checkboxes

test_view_points.viewpoint: Not select any item, then click on "Check all" option
expected_result:
+ "Check all" option is changed from UNCheck to CheckED
+ All related items are Check

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select some items by manual, then click on "Check all" option
expected_result:
+ "Check all" option is changed from UNCheck to CheckED
+ All related items are Check

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items which related with "Check all" option
expected_result: + "Check all" option is changed from UNCheck to CheckED

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items which related with "Check all" option, then click on "Check all" option
expected_result:
+ "Check all" option is changed from CheckED to UNCheck
+ All related items are UNCheck

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items, then deselect some items of them.
expected_result:
+ "Check all" option is changed from CheckED to UNCheck
+ Deselected items are UNCheck, other items are CheckED.

description: Testing three-state checkbox functionality with parent-child relationships

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items, then deselect some items of them.  (remain at least 1 item)
expected_result:
+ As soon as deselect the first item, TriState CheckBox option is changed from CheckED to INDETERMINATE
+ Deselected items are UNCheck, other items are CheckED.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items which related with TriState CheckBox option, then click on TriState CheckBox option
expected_result:
+ TriState CheckBox option is changed from CheckED to UNCheck
+ All related items are UNCheck

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all items which related with TriState CheckBox option, then deselect all of them
expected_result:
+ TriState CheckBox option is changed from CheckED to UNCheck
+ All related items are UNCheck

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select all of items which related with TriState CheckBox option
expected_result: + As soon as select the last related item, TriState CheckBox option is changed from INDETERMINATE to CheckED

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select some items by manual, then click on TriState CheckBox option
expected_result:
+ TriState CheckBox option is changed from INDETERMINATE to CheckED
+ All related items are Check

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select some items, then deselect all items of them.
expected_result: + As soon as deselect the last item, TriState CheckBox option is changed from INDETERMINATE to UNCheck

test_view_points.viewpoint: Not select any item, then click on TriState CheckBox option
expected_result:
+ TriState CheckBox option is changed from UNCheck to CheckED
+ All related items are Check

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select at least 1 item which related with TriState CheckBox option
expected_result: + As soon as select at least 1 related item, TriState CheckBox option is changed from UNCheck to INDETERMINATE
